purpose: Trigger evaluation for the cold-start interview. Each prompt should either fire the cold-start-interview skill (positive) or NOT fire it / fire a different skill (negative).

prompts.input: I just installed the llms.txt advisor plugin. How do I set it up?
prompts.rationale: Updated baseline (was incorrectly cold-start). 'Just installed' + 'how do I set it up' is orientation — user hasn't committed to 15-20 min configuration yet. New descriptions correctly route this to setup-recommender. Cold-start is for when user is ready to actually configure.

prompts.input: I don't have an llms.txt yet but I want to create one. Where do I start?
prompts.rationale: Fresh-start scenario — description explicitly covers 'I don't have an llms.txt yet'

prompts.input: Let's configure this plugin for our marketplace site
prompts.rationale: Configure intent — primary use case for cold-start

prompts.input: Review my existing llms.txt and tell me what's wrong
prompts.rationale: Has existing file + wants review → audit, not cold-start

prompts.input: Generate the file for my site
prompts.rationale: Direct generation request — should route to generate (assumes profile already configured, otherwise generate bounces to cold-start)

prompts.input: We want to start fresh because our current llms.txt is broken
prompts.rationale: Start fresh trigger; cold-start should run, then route to audit/generate after profile is set

prompts.input: What's the latest research on llms.txt and AI citations?
prompts.rationale: General research question — advise handles this, not cold-start
